assignments.description: Last Status Change field can be used as the moment the case was added in routing either as New or Response Received.
assignments.name: ass_01_Last_Status_Change
assignments.label: 1. Last Status Change

assignments.description: When not an email to case, then reset the values below
assignments.name: ass_01_Origin_2_Phone
assignments.label: 1. Origin 2 Phone

decisions.description: Checks if email is supplied, when not, origin is set back to phone
decisions.name: dec_01_Check_Email_Adress
decisions.label: 1. Check Email Adress

decisions.description: Nothing is strange setting when record is set, 1 or 2 settings should be switched on
decisions.name: dec_01_Checks_Email_Warning_Marks
decisions.label: 1. Checks Email Warning Marks

decisions.description: Sets Skill Assignment field which determines skills on cases. Sets special values on G4S cases and ignores cases where values when Voicemail queue has been set.
decisions.name: dec_01_Last_Queue_Check
decisions.label: 1. Last Queue Check

decisions.description: Checks the Origin of the Case on create
decisions.name: dec_01_Origin
decisions.label: 1. Origin

Flow.description: removed the rest of the Gen256 shit Added ServiceEnitity__c (Reseller__c) to allow multiple service environments Flow checks all incomming email cases on create. Reassign Queue for email cases based on the subject It also sets the flag for sending out the auto response mail

formulas.description: Determine Owner Type based of the Object Identifier of the OwnerId
formulas.name: fOwnerType

Flow.label: rbc - Case

recordLookups.name: dgr_01_Email_Warning_Mark
recordLookups.label: 1. Email Warning Mark
recordLookups.filterLogic: (((1 AND 2) OR (3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6) OR (8 AND 2)) AND 7)
